modules.name: System summary
modules.hint: Extracts core host details from offline registry hives using RegRipper.

modules.name: Velociraptor Results copy-out
modules.hint: Copies Velociraptor Results folder content into the case output, when present.

modules.name: Windows Registry hives
modules.hint: Caches and processes Windows system registry hives, including dirty hive preparation where possible.

modules.name: Amcache
modules.hint: Processes the Amcache hive for program execution and application inventory artefacts.

modules.name: AppCompatCache / ShimCache
modules.hint: Processes SYSTEM hive AppCompatCache / ShimCache entries for execution-related artefacts.

modules.name: Prefetch
modules.hint: Prefetch is not normally present on Windows Server systems.

modules.name: NTFS metadata ($MFT / $J)
modules.hint: Processes NTFS $MFT and USN Journal $J files when they can be located.

modules.name: SRUM
modules.hint: Processes SRUDB.dat with the SOFTWARE hive for network and application usage artefacts.

modules.name: User artefacts
modules.hint: Processes user profile artefacts such as NTUSER.dat, UsrClass.dat, Jump Lists, LNKs, ShellBags, and PSReadLine.

modules.name: Windows Event Logs (EvtxECmd)
modules.hint: Parses Windows EVTX files with EvtxECmd into CSV output.

modules.name: DuckDB event log summaries
modules.hint: Creates summary CSVs from EvtxECmd output using editable DuckDB SQL queries.

modules.name: Hayabusa event log timeline
modules.hint: Runs Hayabusa against Windows Event Logs to create a super-verbose JSONL timeline.

modules.name: Takajo Hayabusa analysis
modules.hint: Runs Takajo automagic analysis over Hayabusa JSONL output. Requires Hayabusa output.

modules.name: Chainsaw event log hunting
modules.hint: Runs Chainsaw over Windows Event Logs for Sigma and event hunting output.

modules.name: User Access Logs / SUM
modules.hint: User Access Logs / SUM are normally found on Windows Server systems.

modules.name: Browser history (BrowsingHistoryView)
modules.hint: Runs BrowsingHistoryView against user browser history artefacts.

modules.name: Browser history (Forensic webhistory)
modules.hint: Runs forensic-webhistory over the evidence source and writes ISO-formatted browser history output.

modules.name: ParseUSBs
modules.hint: Runs ParseUSBs to extract USB device artefacts. WARNING: tool applies transaction updates to dirty hives.
